jobs.job_description:
We're looking for Frontend Developers (India)!

Qualifications

• Extensive knowledge in building Responsive website using HTML5, CSS and Javascript Frameworks Hands on
• Familiarity with CSS Preprocessors like LESS, SASS
• Highly proficient with JavaScript libraries - React JS, AngularJS, VueJS Strong proficiency in JavaScript, object model, DOM manipulation and event handlers, data structures and Complete understanding of Virtual DOM, component lifecycle, REST API Integration etc
• Good Knowledge on NPM Packing Manager
• Proficiency in writing UI test cases
• Familiarity with GULPJS/Grunt/Webpack would be a Plus Experience in building UI for AEM is an added advantage
• Responsibilities Collaborate with a team of developers and designers to create a website / Mobile Web application
• Developing reusable components, scalable JavaScript code and front-end libraries
• Design the data and presentation layer of the web application s front-end Translating designs and wireframes into high-quality code
• Optimizing components for maximum performance across a vast array of web-capable devices and browsers
• Familiarity working in a globally dispersed scrum team Demonstrated experience in Agile methodologies Collaboration and engagement skills Experience in large scale web application delivery
• Familiarity working with Communications and/or Marketing teams and/or Design Agencies
• Demonstrated adaptability, goal orientated and innovative individual
• A firm grasp of responsive design and mobile application design

(*Note: Scoutit is an independent candidate sourcing partner for this hiring. All applications, candidate screening, and hiring-related actions are conducted directly by the respective employer’s authorized recruitment team. Relevant candidates will be contacted via email and asked to fill in additional details as part of the next stage of the application process.)

Skills: javascript,css,application

Aristocrat is on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer Sr Engineer II to join our dynamic team. Our mission is to bring happiness to life through the power of play, and your role will be integral in realizing this vision. This opportunity is outstanding as it offers the chance to work on innovative technology in a collaborative environment that encourages creativity and high standards. You will play a pivotal role in improving our gaming products, ensuring they remain leaders in the industry.

What You'll Do

• Contribute to product development that aligns with Aristocrat’s strategic product roadmap.
• Spearhead full-stack development encompassing Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, and Node.
• Collaborate on front and back-end game development initiatives.
• Encourage the team with your unwavering passion and drive for all things technical.
• Proactively identify risks and formulate contingency plans.
• Stay abreast of industry trends and advancements.
• Maintain and update existing games with the latest internal libraries, ensuring continuous integration practices.
• Build, implement, and maintain new slots and casino games, features, and functionalities in Aristocrat’s solutions under the Interactive products portfolio.
• Collaborate with team members to refine guidelines.
• Take technical ownership of assigned modules/features.
• Work closely with Software Architects, Product Managers, product developers, subject matter experts, and others on assigned modules.
• Perform analysis and estimation of tasks with minimal deviation.
• Thrive in an open, fun yet challenging environment that offers enormous opportunities for professional and personal growth.

What We're Looking For

• B.Tech. / B.E. / MCA / M.Tech. in Computer Science accompanied by over 3 years of experience.
• At least 4 years of experience working with Angular, JQuery, HTML5, JavaScript, and Typescript.
• Experience with Agile development methodology, preferably Scrum.
• A minimum of 3 years of experience in server-side development with Java.
• Strong communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively within a team.
• Effective interpersonal communication skills coupled with the talent to support and encourage others.

Join us and become part of a group committed to providing flawless, world-class gaming experiences. Your work will affect millions of players who enjoy our games. You'll join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and outstanding results. Apply now and let's create happiness together!

Why Aristocrat?

Aristocrat is a world leader in gaming content and technology, and a top-tier publisher of free-to-play mobile games. We deliver great performance for our B2B customers and bring joy to the lives of the millions of people who love to play our casino and mobile games. And while we focus on fun, we never forget our responsibilities. We strive to lead the way in responsible gameplay, and to lift the bar in company governance, employee wellbeing and sustainability. We’re a diverse business united by shared values and an inspiring mission to bring joy to life through the power of play.

We aim to create an environment where individual differences are valued, and all employees have the opportunity to realize their potential. We welcome and encourage applications from all people regardless of age, gender, race, ethnicity, cultural background, disability status or LGBTQ+ identity. EEO M/F/D/V

• World Leader in Gaming Entertainment
• Robust benefits package
• Global career opportunities

Our Values

• All about the Player
• Talent Unleashed
• Collective Brilliance
• Good Business Good Citizen

Travel Expectations

None

Additional Information

At this time, we are unable to sponsor work visas for this position. Candidates must be authorized to work in the job posting location for this position on a full-time basis without the need for current or future visa sponsorship.
Architecting the digital future. We provide high-end consulting and innovative technology solutions for global market leaders.

jobs.job_description:
Job Title

Country

Frontend Application Development Lead - Grade E

Service Line Group

Group Digital

KPMG Overview

Cloud Engineering within Group Digital provides build and run capabilities for
enterprise cloud platforms. This includes platform automation, DevOps tooling,
CI/CD enablement, security baseline implementation, and operational support
across Azure, AWS, and Google Cloud.

In addition to platform engineering capabilities, the team maintains a number of
internally developed web applications and digital solutions that support both
platform operations and selected business services.

These applications provide operational capabilities, reporting, integrations,
workflow automation, and contemporary user experiences used by engineering teams and
business stakeholders across the Firm.

Service Line Information

Cloud Engineering services the broader Firm through delivery of core technology
and managed services capabilities, collaboration and innovation development
services, and development of strategic technology partnerships.

The Frontend Application Development capability supports both platform teams and
business services by developing and maintaining internally built web
applications that enable operational processes, data visibility, user
engagement, and integration across technology platforms.

Job Description

The Team

The role sits within the Cloud Engineering / Custom Apps team in Group Digital
and supports the development and operation of internally developed web
applications used by both platform teams and business services.

These applications provide operational tooling, reporting dashboards, automation
capabilities, contemporary web interfaces, and integration services across the cloud
engineering setting and selected business workflows.

The team works closely with platform engineers, service owners, UX stakeholders,
and business users to ensure that applications remain reliable, secure,
user-friendly, and aligned with operational needs.

At Aristocrat, we are highly dedicated to crafting world-class gaming experiences! As a Frontend Developer, you will have a meaningful role in crafting the future of our latest gaming products. Our mission is to bring happiness to life through the power of play, and we believe your skills and passion will help us achieve this ambitious goal. Join our energetic team where your contributions will be recognized, and your abilities will thrive in a collaborative environment. This is an outstanding opportunity to work on powerful projects and make a major impact in the gaming industry.

What You'll Do

• Develop mobile and web games on HTML platforms using JavaScript.
• Build and maintain web applications and infrastructures.
• Adapt games for mobile devices and web browsers.
• Apply the PIXI framework to improve gaming experiences.
• Implement TypeScript programming for robust game development.
• Integrate Spine animations to bring characters to life.
• Work within an agile methodology using the Scrum framework.
• Collaborate with team members to deliver flawless gaming solutions.
• Initiate and lead projects with responsibility and determination.
• Communicate effectively with colleagues to successfully implement game features.

What We're Looking For

• 3+ years of proven experience developing games for HTML mobile/web – Must.
• 5+ years of experience in JavaScript development – Must.
• Experience in adapting applications for mobile devices and web browsers – Big Advantage.
• Proficiency in PIXI framework – Big Advantage.
• Expertise in TypeScript programming – Big Advantage.
• Familiarity with Spine animations – Big Advantage.
• Experience working with agile methodology and Scrum framework.
• Responsible, self-initiator, standout colleague with great communication skills.

Join us at Aristocrat and be part of a team that is determined to compete at the highest level in the gaming industry. Your contribution will help us deliver happiness to millions of players worldwide!

Why Aristocrat?

Aristocrat is a world leader in gaming content and technology, and a top-tier publisher of free-to-play mobile games. We deliver great performance for our B2B customers and bring joy to the lives of the millions of people who love to play our casino and mobile games. And while we focus on fun, we never forget our responsibilities. We strive to lead the way in responsible gameplay, and to lift the bar in company governance, employee wellbeing and sustainability. We’re a diverse business united by shared values and an inspiring mission to bring joy to life through the power of play.

We aim to create an environment where individual differences are valued, and all employees have the opportunity to realize their potential. We welcome and encourage applications from all people regardless of age, gender, race, ethnicity, cultural background, disability status or LGBTQ+ identity. EEO M/F/D/V

• World Leader in Gaming Entertainment

• Global career opportunities

Our Values

• Good Business Good Citizen

None

Lead Developer Frontend

Position Description

Position Details

- Job Title: Senior Frontend Developer Logistics Visualization Platform
- Position: Lead Analyst
- Experience: 10 12 Years
- Category: Software Development / Engineering
- Employment Type: Full Time
- Location: Bangalore, India
- Shift Timing: 11:30 AM 8:30 PM

________________________________________
Job Description

We are looking for a Senior Frontend Developer with robust expertise in React and Micro Frontend Architecture to build highly interactive logistics planning and operational visualization platforms.
The ideal candidate should have hands-on experience in developing real-time visualization interfaces including Gantt-style planning boards, scheduling dashboards, operational control towers, workflow management systems, and event-driven UI applications.
The candidate will be responsible for designing scalable frontend architectures, driving reusable UI standards, optimizing application performance, and collaborating with backend, DevOps, and product engineering teams in delivering enterprise-grade logistics and supply chain solutions.

Your future duties and responsibilities
Must Have Skills

- Strong expertise in:

o React
o TypeScript / JavaScript
o Micro Frontend Architecture
o Event-Driven UI Development

- Hands-on experience with:

o REST API Integration
o Real-time Data Updates
o Visualization Frameworks
o Gantt / Project Management Style Interfaces

- Strong understanding of:

o Microservices Ecosystems
o Event-Driven Architecture
o Kafka Integration Concepts

- Experience building:

o Enterprise Dashboards
o Operational Monitoring Interfaces
o Scheduling & Planner Applications
o Workflow Management Systems

- Familiarity with:

o Frontend DevOps Practices
o CI/CD Pipelines
o Performance Optimization
o Responsive UI Development
o Accessibility Standards

- Experience working in Agile/Scrum delivery environments
- Strong leadership, mentoring, and stakeholder communication skills

________________________________________
Good to Have Skills

- Experience in:

o Logistics
o Transportation Planning
o Warehouse Orchestration
o Supply Chain Platforms
o Material Planning Systems

- Exposure to:

o AI-assisted development tools such as GitHub Copilot
o Cloud-native frontend deployment models
o .NET Full Stack ecosystems

- Knowledge of:

o Frontend Security Best Practices
o UI Component Standardization
o Design Systems
o Frontend Observability & Monitoring

- Experience with Kubernetes and cloud deployment environments

Required qualifications to be successful in this role
Roles & Responsibilities

- Design and develop scalable frontend applications using React
- Build and maintain Micro Frontend-based enterprise UI platforms
- Develop real-time operational dashboards and logistics visualization interfaces
- Implement event-driven UI interactions with near real-time updates
- Integrate frontend systems with REST APIs and Kafka-driven event streams
- Ensure responsive, high-performance, and user-friendly interfaces
- Define reusable frontend frameworks, components, and engineering standards
- Collaborate closely with backend, DevOps, QA, and platform engineering teams
- Drive frontend governance, code quality, and architecture best practices
- Optimize application performance, maintainability, and accessibility
- Mentor engineering teams and support technical decision-making
- Participate in CI/CD implementation and deployment automation activities

________________________________________
Preferred Candidate Profile

- Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
- Excellent communication and collaboration abilities

You are invited to be an owner from day 1 as we work together to bring our Dream to life. Thats why we call ourselves CGI Partners rather than employees. We benefit from our collective success and actively shape our companys strategy and direction.

jobs.job_title: Full Stack Frontend Developer & + E2E Automation Testing (TT)
jobs.employer_name: Mercedes-Benz Research and Development India Private Limited
jobs.job_description:
Tasks

About MBRDI:

Mercedes-Benz Research and Development India (MBRDI), headquartered in Bengaluru with a satellite office in Pune, is the largest R&D center for Mercedes-Benz Group AG outside of Germany. Our mission is to drive innovation and excellence in automotive engineering, digitalization, and sustainable mobility solutions, shaping the future of mobility.

Role Overview : Senior Frontend Engineer

We are looking for a Senior Frontend Engineer to lead the evolution of our Retail UI. You will be responsible for maintaining and modernizing our frontend applications while ensuring seamless integration with a complex ecosystem of internal and external services.

Key Responsibilities
Architecture & Development: Lead the development of the AngularJS Retail UI, ensuring performance and scalability across DEV, INT, and PROD environments.
Integration: Collaborate with backend teams to integrate core services including Digital Signature Service, HERE, and CCS.
Quality Assurance: Drive test-driven development by implementing robust end-to-end testing suites using Cypress.
Security & Compliance: Proactively manage vulnerabilities using Blackduck to ensure the frontend remains secure against modern threats.
Release Management: Manage the frontend release lifecycle through Azure DevOps and GitHub CI/CD pipelines.

Technical Qualifications

Frameworks: Expert-level knowledge of AngularJS and modern JavaScript patterns.
Tooling: Proficiency with GitHub and Azure DevOps for CI/CD.
Testing: Strong experience with Cypress for automated UI testing.
Environment: Comfortable working within a structured JIRA/Confluence agile workflow.

Automation Testing using Playwright
Qualifications

Educational Qualifications:

Bachelor's degree/ master’s degree in engineering

Why Join Us?

Be part of a purpose-driven organization that’s shaping the future of mobility. Work on cutting-edge technologies and global projects. Thrive in a collaborative, diverse, and inclusive environment. Access world-class infrastructure and learning opportunities.

Equal Opportunity Statement:

At MBRDI, we are committed to diversity and inclusion. We welcome applications from all qualified individuals, regardless of gender, background, or ability.

Company Description RightDirect Growth Consulting Company is a digital advisory and execution partner that helps organizations accelerate growth, transformation, and measurable outcomes. Operating at the intersection of strategy, design, technology, AI, and digital marketing, RightDirect supports leaders in moving faster and delivering tangible business impact. With experience across 70+ global clients, the company focuses on UI/UX and customer experience, technology development, AI and marketing automation, digital marketing, and modern workplace enablement. RightDirect partners primarily with high-growth startups and small-to-mid-market enterprises, emphasizing speed, clarity, ROI, and outcome-driven delivery. Its hands-on approach combines strategic advisory with deep implementation capability to build scalable, AI-enabled growth engines that improve product launches, customer engagement, and operational efficiency.

Role Description This is a full-time, on-site Frontend Developer role based in Tiruchirappalli. The Frontend Developer will design and implement user-facing features, build responsive interfaces, and ensure seamless integration with backend services. Day-to-day responsibilities include translating UI/UX designs into clean, maintainable code, optimizing applications for performance and accessibility, and collaborating with designers, backend developers, and digital marketing teams. The role involves participating in code reviews, troubleshooting issues across devices and browsers, and contributing to reusable component libraries and best practices. The developer will work closely with product and strategy teams to align frontend solutions with business objectives and deliver outcome-focused digital experiences.

Qualifications
• Candidates should possess strong Front-End Development and Responsive Web Design skills, with experience building modern, user-centric interfaces.
• Candidates should possess solid Web Development and Software Development skills, including familiarity with frameworks, version control, and performance optimization.
• Candidates should possess a foundational understanding of Back-End Web Development to collaborate effectively on API integration and data flow.
• Candidates should possess proficiency in HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, along with experience in one or more modern frontend frameworks (e.g., React, Vue, Angular).
• Candidates should possess experience with cross-browser compatibility, accessibility standards, and mobile-first design.
• Candidates should possess strong problem-solving abilities, attention to detail, and the capacity to work collaboratively in an on-site, multidisciplinary team.
• A bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience, is beneficial.
• Experience in digital consulting, product-focused environments, or AI-enabled applications is an advantage.

jobs.job_title: Frontend Developer | React.js | JavaScript | HTML | CSS | Next.js
jobs.job_description:
We are looking for a passionate and creative Frontend Developer with experience in React.js to join our growing engineering team. This role is ideal for developers who enjoy building modern, responsive, and user-friendly web applications.

As a Frontend Developer, you will collaborate with designers and backend developers to create high-quality user interfaces while ensuring excellent performance and usability. Freshers with strong personal projects or internship experience are encouraged to apply.

Key Responsibilities
• Develop responsive web applications using React.js
• Convert UI/UX designs into functional interfaces
• Write clean, reusable, and maintainable code
• Integrate REST APIs with frontend applications
• Optimize application performance
• Debug and fix frontend issues
• Collaborate with designers and backend developers
• Ensure cross-browser compatibility
• Use Git/GitHub for version control

Required Skills
• React.js
• JavaScript (ES6+)
• HTML5
• CSS3
• Responsive Web Design
• REST APIs
• Git & GitHub
• Problem Solving

Preferred Skills
• Next.js
• TypeScript
• Redux
• Tailwind CSS
• Material UI
• Firebase
• Basic Node.js

Qualifications
• Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field
• Freshers with strong React projects are encouraged to apply

Experience

0–2 Years

Employment Type

Full-time

Salary

₹4,00,000 – ₹9,00,000 per annum (based on skills and experience)

Pay: ₹300,000.00 - ₹500,000.00 per year

Benefits:
• Cell phone reimbursement
• Commuter assistance
• Flexible schedule
• Food provided
• Health insurance
• Internet reimbursement
• Leave encashment
• Life insurance
• Paid sick time
• Paid time off
• Provident Fund
• Work from home

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Pune, Maharashtra
